items.title: Legacy auth middleware still uses synchronous bcrypt
items.description: The auth middleware uses bcrypt.compareSync() which blocks the event loop. Under concurrent login spikes this creates latency for all active requests, not just authentication ones.
items.risk: Under a DDoS-style login flood this could take down all API endpoints simultaneously

items.title: Frontend task list re-renders entire list on any state change
items.description: The task list component has no memoisation. Any change to any task (even in another project) triggers a full re-render of the entire task list. With 200+ tasks this causes noticeable jank.
items.workaround: None — visible to users with large projects
items.risk: Users with large projects experience degraded UI performance

items.title: Direct database access in three API routes bypasses ORM
items.description: Routes /api/v1/admin/stats, /api/v1/reports/export, and /api/v1/billing/usage use raw SQL queries that bypass the ORM layer. These routes are not covered by the connection pool and lack the query timeout middleware.
items.risk: A slow query on these routes can exhaust the database connection pool, affecting all other queries

items.title: CSS bundle includes unused component styles
items.description: The CSS bundle (340kb gzipped) includes styles for 12 deprecated components that were removed from the UI 6 months ago. PurgeCSS is not configured.
items.risk: Bundle size slightly increases initial page load time
